videos.headline: Breaking update.
videos.description:
US Defence Secretary claims a US submarine torpedo sank Iran’s warship IRIS Dena in the Indian Ocean.

32 crew rescued.

Over 100 sailors reported missing.

Sri Lanka confirms rescue operations underway.

Pentagon calls it first such US naval attack since World War II.

Tensions rise in the region.

videos.headline: “US SUBMARINE SINKS IRAN WARSHIP!” First Since WWII?
videos.description:
Breaking update.

US Defence Secretary claims a US submarine torpedo sank Iran’s warship IRIS Dena in the Indian Ocean.

32 crew rescued.

Over 100 sailors reported missing.

Sri Lanka confirms rescue operations underway.

Pentagon calls it first such US naval attack since World War II.

Tensions rise in the region.

If you say “Generate Image”, I’ll create a high-impact vertical thumbnail featuring a submarine silhouette, explosion at sea, and “101 MISSING” highlight for maximum CTR.
